title: Integrate codebase-memory-mcp into cape agents and skills
description:
## Goal
Integrate codebase-memory-mcp as an MCP server. Auto-index on session start.
Add minimal graph-tool references to codebase-investigator, bug-tracer, brainstorm,
debug-issue, and fix-bug. Leverage codebase-memory-mcp's own installed skills for
detailed tool-use instructions. Skip ADR features (beads covers that).

## Implementation
1. Install binary and run codebase-memory-mcp install
2. Update session-start hook with auto-index reminder
3. Add graph-first section to codebase-investigator agent
4. Add graph-assisted section to bug-tracer agent
5. Add one-liner references in brainstorm, debug-issue, fix-bug skills

## Success criteria
- [ ] MCP server registered in ~/.claude/settings.json
- [ ] Session start hook emits index_repository instruction
- [ ] codebase-investigator references graph tools
- [ ] bug-tracer references graph tools
- [ ] brainstorm, debug-issue, fix-bug have minimal graph references
- [ ] make check passes

title: Epic: Build cape skill and command library
description: Create cape's full skill and command set. Each skill is independently designed, inspired by hyperpowers' functionality but built from scratch. Do not read hyperpowers source implementations unless explicitly told to. Skills use cape conventions (br output, brainstorm-first design). Commands are slash-command entry points.

title: Skill: beads
description: br CLI reference skill. Exists, may need refinement. Do not read the hyperpowers source implementation unless explicitly told to.

title: Skill: pr
description: Pull request creation. Do not read the hyperpowers source implementation unless explicitly told to.

title: Skill: review
description: Code review with br-tracked findings. Do not read the hyperpowers source implementation unless explicitly told to.

title: Skill: task-refinement
description: SRE-level edge-case analysis for tasks. Do not read the hyperpowers source implementation unless explicitly told to.

title: Skill: test-driven-development
description: RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle. Do not read the hyperpowers source implementation unless explicitly told to.

title: Skill: using-cape
description: Meta-skill establishing cape workflows and skill discovery. Do not read the hyperpowers source implementation unless explicitly told to.

title: Skill: writing-plans
description: Detailed implementation planning with file paths and verification steps. Do not read the hyperpowers source implementation unless explicitly told to.

title: Command: lint
description: Lint slash command. Do not read the hyperpowers source implementation unless explicitly told to.

title: Command: recap
description: Recap slash command for narrated step commits. Do not read the hyperpowers source implementation unless explicitly told to.

title: Skill: branch
description: Git branch naming from context. Do not read the hyperpowers source implementation unless explicitly told to.
close_reason: Skill and command created. 2 eval iterations, 100% pass rate. Description optimized.
